prompt.name: 模块 C: 边界系统化
prompt.sub_stage_name: 10 tests, 3 min — diagnostic_engine + persistence + LLM 降级路径空安全

test.name: diag engine empty masteries
test.code: def test_diag_empty_masteries(): """diagnostic_engine enabled 但 get_all_masteries()={} -> 不崩溃。""" from src.coach.diagnostic_engine import DiagnosticEngine de = DiagnosticEngine({"enabled": True}) masteries = de.store.get_all_masteries() assert isinstance(masteries, dict) summary = de.get_mastery_summary() assert isinstance(summary.get("skills"), dict)

test.name: process_turn no pending
test.code: def test_process_turn_no_pending(): """process_turn() 无 pending probe -> 返回 None。""" from src.coach.diagnostic_engine import DiagnosticEngine de = DiagnosticEngine({"enabled": True}) result = de.process_turn(user_input="test", turn_count=1) assert result is None

test.name: should_and_generate max probes
test.code: def test_should_and_generate_max_probes(): """should_and_generate() 超 max_probes -> 返回 None。""" from src.coach.diagnostic_engine import DiagnosticEngine de = DiagnosticEngine({"enabled": True, "max_probes_per_session": 1}) de._probe_count = 1 # simulate max reached result = de.should_and_generate(turn_count=99, intent="test") assert result is None

test.name: diag enabled no crash
test.code: def test_diag_enabled_no_crash(): """diagnostic_engine 全路径空安全。""" from src.coach.agent import CoachAgent a = CoachAgent() if a.diagnostic_engine: a.diagnostic_engine.process_turn("test", 1) a.diagnostic_engine.should_and_generate(1, intent="test") # 不崩溃即通过

test.name: persistence empty profile
test.code: def test_persistence_empty_profile(): """get_profile() 无行 -> 返回空 dict。""" from src.coach.persistence import SessionPersistence p = SessionPersistence("nonexistent_session_xyz") profile = p.get_profile() assert isinstance(profile, dict) # 无数据时不抛异常

test.name: persistence empty trend
test.code: def test_persistence_empty_trend(): """get_mastery_trend() 无数据 -> 返回 []. """ from src.coach.persistence import SessionPersistence p = SessionPersistence("nonexistent_session_xyz") trend = p.get_mastery_trend("ttm_stage", days=30) assert isinstance(trend, list) assert len(trend) == 0

test.name: persistence empty skills
test.code: def test_persistence_empty_skills(): """get_skills_with_recency() skill_masteries={} -> 返回 {} 。""" from src.coach.persistence import SessionPersistence p = SessionPersistence("nonexistent_session_xyz") skills = p.get_skills_with_recency() assert isinstance(skills, dict)

test.name: LLM disabled no crash
test.code: def test_llm_disabled_no_crash(): """LLMConfig.from_yaml(enabled=false) -> 规则引擎保底。""" from src.coach.llm.config import LLMConfig cfg = LLMConfig.from_yaml({"llm": {"enabled": False}}) assert cfg.enabled is False assert cfg.api_key == "" # no key loaded

test.name: LLM validation fail fallback
test.code: def test_llm_validation_fail_fallback(): """LLM output 校验失败 -> llm_generated=False。""" from src.coach.llm.schemas import LLMOutputValidator # invalid payload: missing statement valid, errors = LLMOutputValidator.validate({"question": "?"}) assert not valid assert len(errors) > 0 # valid payload valid2, errors2 = LLMOutputValidator.validate({"statement": "hello"}) assert valid2

test.name: LLM error no crash
test.code: def test_llm_error_no_crash(): """LLMConfig with bad key -> from_yaml raises LLMConfigError。""" from src.coach.llm.config import LLMConfig, LLMConfigError import os # Set a known-bad env var and verify graceful handling os.environ["_TEST_BAD_KEY"] = "" try: cfg = LLMConfig.from_yaml({"llm": {"enabled": True, "api_key_env": "_TEST_BAD_KEY"}}) assert cfg.api_key == "" # empty key except LLMConfigError: pass # exception is also acceptable finally: os.environ.pop("_TEST_BAD_KEY", None)
